prompt:
Use my uploaded portrait only for facial identity and hairstyle. Create a cute realistic 3D chibi toy-stall scene, similar to the reference: a large chibi 3D version of me standing behind a small street vendor table, under a red-and-white striped canopy, outdoor sidewalk background, natural daylight, shallow depth of field. Keep my face recognizable but stylized as a soft 3D collectible figure, natural skin texture, not plastic, not anime-flat

On the wooden table, place many small 3D Gugu Gaga-inspired penguin figurines in neat rows: black-and-white rounded penguin body, white belly, yellow beak and feet, big gray eyes, blush cheeks, short black hair bangs, tiny flipper arms, cute soft-vinyl / matte resin toy texture. The table toys must stay in a polished 3D collectible style, not plush fabric. Realistic camera perspective, high-quality product photography, cinematic soft lighting, detailed street-market atmosphere, no watermark, no logo, no text.
